## ByType type

Narrows a union to the given [MediaType](/reference/cmaf-lite.mediatype)<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
type ByType<K, T extends MediaType> = Extract<K, {
    type: T;
}>;
```
**References:** [MediaType](/reference/cmaf-lite.mediatype)
